content:
守密人你好：
       彌薩格大學校務處將於6月17日22:05進行校內設施修復，更新完成後您將得到通知，重新進入遊戲。對於更新可能給大家帶來的不便，我們會準備一份補給物資以示歉意。祝大家調查順利！ 
  
【補給物資】
在線維護補償：銀芯*50
  
【領取條件】
領取時間截至2025年7月1日23:59。請記得及時前往郵箱領取補給物資哦。  
 
【更新內容】
● 將克萊門汀超限爆發「潛意識侵蝕」的獲得力量效果由攻擊力的 45% 修正為 50%。使其符合角色前瞻及原技能描述。
● 修復了鑰令「錯位命運」無法編入隊伍的問題。
● 優化了語言設置為英語時的以下文本表述問題：
    ○ 跟隨中文修復了克萊門汀超限爆發描述；
    ○ 修正了喚醒體菲茵特技能幼芽萌生的英語翻譯；
    ○ 優化了部分喚醒體技能、戰鬥狀態、命輪的英語翻譯措辭；
    ○ 優化了組隊界面、融災禁區意識深潛界面的UI文本；
    ○ 優化了半步之隔·復刻 活動界面的任務相關表述

V2.2.2.9 Online Maintenance Notice
Dear Keeper,
    The Mythag University Administration Office will conduct facility repairs on June 17 at 22:05(UTC+8). You will be notified once the update is complete and can re-enter the game. We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause and will provide a supply package as compensation. Happy investigating!
    
【Supply Package】
Maintenance Compensation: Silver*50
    
【Claim Conditions】
Claim period ends on July 1 2025(UTC+8), at 23:59. Please remember to check your mailbox to claim the supply package.
     
【Update Content】
● Corrected the "Subconscious Corrosion" Over-Exaltation effect for Clementine, changing the ATK boost from 45% to 50% to align with the character preview and original skill description.
● Fixed an issue where the Posse "Derision of Destiny" could not be added to the team.
● Localization Fixes and Improvements (English Language Setting):
    ○ Updated the translation for Clementine's Over-Exaltation description;
    ○ Fixed the English translation of Awakener Faint's skill Sprouting Bud, 
    ○ Optimized the English translation wording for some Awakener skills, battle statuses, and Wheels of Destiny;
    ○ Optimized UI text in the team lineup interface, D-Effect Zone, and Phantasmal Dive interface;
    ○ Optimized the task-related descriptions in the Half Step Away: Rerun event.
